questions.question_text: Use the histogram in 6(a) to estimate the mode of the distribution.

Three forces $\mathbf{F}_1 = (2\mathbf{m} + \mathbf{n})$, $\mathbf{F}_2 = (-3\mathbf{m} + 4\mathbf{n})$ and $\mathbf{F}_3 = (4\mathbf{m} - 6\mathbf{n})$ act on a body with mass $12 \text{ kg}$. Find the magnitude of the acceleration of the body.
